caption: A group of people perform synchronized martial arts movements inside a large, well-lit hall with a high ceiling and an ornate chandelier. Most of the practitioners are dressed in blue traditional Chinese uniforms, while one man in the center wears a white uniform. They are positioned on a blue carpeted floor, with banquet tables and guests visible in the background. Across the sequence, the practitioners move in unison, shifting their weight and extending their arms in coordinated gestures. The man in white leads the movement, stepping forward and swinging his arms in a fluid motion, while the others mirror his actions. As the movements progress, their postures shift from a wide stance to a more balanced, centered position, demonstrating a rhythmic flow of practice. There is no on-screen text or logos visible in the scene.
